title: Mediterranean Lamb Pilaf
description: A savory, flavorful Italian dish made with richly seasoned lamb and Mediterranean pilaf. This hearty recipe is perfect for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Pilaf Mix
ingredients.notes: includes orzo, cherry tomatoes, and herbs

instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the lamb to a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Mediterranean pilaf mix to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the cooked pilaf mix to the Dutch oven with the lamb.
Sprinkle the crushed oregano, salt, and black pepper over the top of the lamb and pilaf.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30-40 minutes, until the lamb is cooked through and the pilaf is tender.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
